titleStmt.title: SII 34.66: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 66. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north, west and south walls of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 27th year, Tulā, sudi 10, Sunday, Śatabhisaj = A.D. 1097, October 18, Sunday.

The mahāsabhā of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam of Gēyavinōda-vaḷanāḍu decided to assign some temple land lying fallow over thirty years to a temple servant for reclaiming it and making a temple garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātuvirumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟantu maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇan mElkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittun tan cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷOṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kOrājakEcari panmarāna tripupana cakravatthikatiḷ śrīkulOttuṅkacOḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu tulā nāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyatti nānṟu kEyaviṉOtavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīkāmaravalic caruppatimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Eṅkaḷūr Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkOṭiśvaramuṭaiyār kOyililE taṭṭaḻi koṭṭit tanmi Ūtik kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntup paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu sabhāviva ṣtai ceyta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkOṭiśvaramuṭaiyār tirunāmattāl kiṭanta nilattu cOḻamātEvi vatikkuk kiḻakkut tiruvārūr vāykkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu mEṟkaṭaiya nālumāvil teṟkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭumāvil ka yk kOtaṇṭarāmap peruvāykkāl nilam Araimāvaraikkāṇi ka mEṟkaṭaiya nilam mākāṇi yaraikkāṇiyum mūnṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu vaṭakkil nālumāvil mEṟkaṭaiya Iraṇṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Arai
kaḷ śrīkolōttuṅka cōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatukku munpu 3 10 5 sanmasrattiṉ Uttēcam Ōṭaiyumuṭaippumāyppayir ceyya Uṇṇātēkiṭanta maiyil yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu Ittēvar kanmikaḷ piccatēvan tirunantavaṉanennum piyarāl tirunantavaṉamāka tiruttit tamaṟkkāku payircētu Innilattu vanta pōka mittēvaṟku Arjanāpōkamāka nāṅkaḷ viṭṭamayilinilattukku vanta Iṟaiyilikkācum maṟṟu meppērppaṭṭituñ can=tirātittavaṟ Iṟukkak kaṭavarallātākaḷākavum Innilattukku Iṟaiyilikkācum maṟṟu meppērppaṭṭituṅ kōmaṟṟamar koḷḷil nāṅkaḷe yiṟukka kaṭavōmākavum Ipparicu sammatittu sabhāvivastai cētōm peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Ippaṭi paṇittār cōḻamahātēviccēri Ātanūr vīran tāmōtiranārum Avanikarvaccēri muppirāl nārāyaṇan sahaśraṉārum rājakēcaricērip pālai lakṣumaṇan śrīkaṇṭa nārum kāmaravalli cēri kūvaṇṭūr śrī nārāyaṇan śahaśranārum paṇiyāluḷḷa kaṇ maṅkalamuṭaiyān nārāyaṇan tirumā Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai koḻu
Digital edition of SII 34.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
